#  Delete Drawing Markups (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.
    * 'Standard' level users can only delete markups on their Personal layer unless otherwise configured. To allow 'Standard' level users to delete markups on the public layer, see [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings) under **Allow Standard Level Users to Delete Published Markup.**
    * 'Admin' level users can delete markups on the Published and Personal layer.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing that contains the item you want to delete.
  4. Tap the drawing markup you want to delete.
  5. Tap **Delete**.  
_Note:_ Changes are automatically saved.


## See Also
  * [Edit Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/edit-drawing-markups-ios)
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [Publish Personal Drawing Markups (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/publish-personal-drawing-markups-ios)
title: Delete Drawing Markups (iOS)
description: How to delete drawing markups from the Drawings tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
